race.comment: Looks four main hopes. WOUNDED EAGLE (8) has done little wrong finishing in the placings both runs so far, the latest a near miss here when found one better. Extra trip a plus and should go close. SORELL EAGLES (6) was a close-up fourth on debut two runs back then thereabouts when fifth over 1200m at this track after getting back to last and making late ground. Should relish the longer journey. TIMELY NEEDS (7) finished second first-up at this track then couldn't repeat the dose last time when fourth at this track over 1200m when beaten 3 lengths. Close to a win and looks hard to beat. NEED A GIGGLE (4) is next best.
